name: Hengda New Materials (Fujian) Co.,Ltd
summary: Hengda New Materials (Fujian) Co.,Ltd produces, sells, and services metal materials in China and internationally. It offers rule die steel, steel rules, utility knifes, bi-metal band saw blades, bi-metal strips, circular saw blades, CNC circular saw machines, cutting machines, and five-axis linkage jewelry engraving machines. The company was formerly known as Putian Hengda Machinery and Electricity Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hengda New Materials (Fujian) Co.,Ltd in 2018. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Putian, China.
